nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Swainson's flycatcher
nodes.summary: Swainson's flycatcher（Swainson's flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus swainsoni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Várzea forest、森林，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in mangroves during the non-breeding season. In the non-breeding season in Venezuela it is also found in várzea and terra firme forest. During the non-breeding season in Colombia and Ecuador, subspecies M

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Most are somewhat open and include clearings in extensive forest, wooded cerrado and savanna, scrublands, and riparian zones. The nominate subspecies has been found in relatively small forest fragments including some in urban areas
